name: Security Review Scanner
description: Scan code for common security vulnerabilities

agents.name: Security Scanner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Scan the code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities: injection, broken auth, sensitive data exposure, XXE, broken access control, misconfig, XSS, insecure deserialization, known vulnerabilities, and insufficient logging.

agents.name: Security Reporter
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a security report with: findings ranked by CVSS-style severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), affected code locations, exploit scenarios, specific remediation steps with code examples, and a summary security score.

suggestion_card.title: Security Scanner
suggestion_card.subtitle: Scan code for vulnerabilities
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Scan this code for security issues: [code]

author: agentfactory
